title: Santo and Blue Demon vs. Dracula and the Wolf Man
original_title: Santo y Blue Demon vs Dracula y el Hombre Lobo
overview: After facing defeat at the hands of Cristaldi the magician, Dracula is back to seek revenge and rule the world. With the help of Wolfman and his legion of followers, victory seems eminent. Professor Cristaldi, a descendant of the magician, is warned about Dracula's plans and calls upon El Santo and Blue Demon in the hopes that they can put the infamous Count and the werewolf down for good.

trailers.title: Santo and the Blue Demon Vs. Dracula and the Wolf Man

trailer_groups.title: Santo and the Blue Demon Vs. Dracula and the Wolf Man

en.title: Santo and the Blue Demon Vs. Dracula and the Wolf Man
